instruction: Answer each observation trivia question — True or False?

items.question: A standard deck of cards has 52 cards.
The Statue of Liberty holds her torch in her left hand.
items.explanation: She holds the torch in her right hand.

items.question: A rainbow always appears as a semicircle from the ground.
items.explanation: The ground blocks the bottom half; from a plane you can see a full circle.

items.question: On a standard clock, the number 4 is written as 'IV'.
items.explanation: Most clock faces use 'IIII' instead of 'IV'.

items.question: The Mona Lisa has no eyebrows.
items.explanation: High-resolution scans confirm no visible eyebrows in the current painting.

items.question: A stop sign has 6 sides.
items.explanation: A stop sign is an octagon with 8 sides.

items.question: The Google logo uses four different colors.
On a QWERTY keyboard, the top letter row spells a word.
items.explanation: 'TYPEWRITER' can be spelled using only the top row.

items.question: The Olympic rings have 6 colors including the background.
items.explanation: Blue, yellow, black, green, red rings on white background.

items.question: A standard Rubik's Cube has 6 faces.
items.explanation: Each face has a different color: white, yellow, blue, green, red, orange.

items.question: The stripes on the American flag are all the same width.
A regular soccer ball has more white patches than black.
items.explanation: Classic design: 20 white hexagons, 12 black pentagons.

items.question: The Eiffel Tower has 3 levels open to the public.
items.explanation: Three levels: first floor, second floor, and summit.

items.question: A bowling game consists of 12 frames.
items.explanation: A standard bowling game has 10 frames.
